title: Foreign key constraint fails to prevent consistency error.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE comments (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, content TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);
INSERT INTO comments (user_id, content) VALUES (2, 'This is a comment');
SELECT * FROM comments WHERE user_id IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Foreign key constraint fails to enforce data consistency
